hero.headline: Where Ancient Wisdom
hero.description: A sanctuary bridging clinical trauma recovery, Vedic sciences, and the sacred arts — offering a whole-person path toward restoration and depth.

practitioners.name: Bhima-Karma
practitioners.title: Palmist · Trauma Consultant · Teacher of the Sacred Arts
practitioners.description: Over two decades at the intersection of somatic therapy, trauma consulting, Vedic palmistry, and traditional practice. Bhima-Karma offers palmistry readings, embodied trauma support, and rare transmission in mridanga and Sanskrit — each a distinct doorway into wholeness.

serviceOfferings.blurb: Sacred Vedic hand analysis that reads the living architecture of your life, character, and dharmic potential — with precision, care, and rare depth of insight.
Direct, embodied trauma consulting and somatic therapy for complex trauma, life transitions, and the intersection of psychological and spiritual crisis.
Living lineage transmission in traditional mridanga and foundational Sanskrit — rare, authentic instruction for sincere students of sacred sound and rhythm.

upcomingSangas.title: Monthly Sat Sanga
upcomingSangas.detail: Community gathering — sacred sound, reflection, and shared practice.

upcomingSangas.title: Palmistry Open Evening
upcomingSangas.detail: An informal evening of hand reading demonstrations and Q&A.

upcomingSangas.title: Mridanga Immersion Weekend
upcomingSangas.detail: A rare weekend of traditional mridanga instruction and Sanskrit foundations.

practitioners.name: Caitanya Lila
practitioners.title: Vedic Psychotherapist
practitioners.description: UKCP-registered psychotherapist weaving clinical depth with Vedic psychology. Caitanya Lila holds space for trauma recovery, relational depth, and the soul's deeper intelligence.

serviceOfferings.blurb: UKCP-registered psychotherapy woven with Vedic psychology — holding space for trauma recovery, relational depth, and the soul's deeper intelligence.

upcomingSangas.title: Women's Healing Circle
upcomingSangas.detail: A held space for women navigating trauma, transition, and spiritual awakening.
